channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Summer Weekend Hours of Operations Change in Commons Dining Hall
item.description:
Please be advised that beginning Saturday, June 20, 2026, the Commons Dining Hall weekend hours of operation will change. New Weekend Hours are: 11:00 AM – 5:30 PM (Saturdays and Sundays) Thank you.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Students
